zh.lifeSummary: 當Aymar d'Adhémar de Monteil於1205年出生在法國藍多-盧希隆賀勞爾特艾馬德時，他的父親Géraud II Adhémar de Monteil40歲，母親Mabille de Marseille31歲。他於1250年與Clémence Adhémar de Monteil結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1273年在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯德o姆沙吉包爾-特洛-a奧享年68歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Monteil
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of German or French   Montel  .

Swedish: ornamental name, probably from Latin mons, genitive montis ‘mountain, hill’ as a translation of the Swedish word or placename element berg (see Berg ) + the suffix -ell, a derivative of the Latin adjectival ending -elius.

variants.name: Montel
meanings: German: from a short form of an ancient Germanic personal name formed with munt ‘protection, guardianship’.
French: topographic name from Occitan montel ‘little mountain’, or a habitational name from Le Montel, the name of several places in Auvergne and Forez.

nameMeanings.name: Aymar
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Aymar d'Adhémar de Monteil was born in 1205, in Aymard, Hérault, Languedoc-Roussillon, France, his father, Géraud II Adhémar de Monteil, was 40 and his mother, Mabille de Marseille, was 31. He married Clémence Adhémar de Monteil in 1250. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died in 1273, in Saint-Paul-Trois-Châteaux, Drôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Aymar d'Adhémar de Monteil est né en 1205, à Aymard, Hérault, Languedoc-Roussillon, France, son père, Géraud II Adhémar de Monteil, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Mabille de Marseille, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Clémence Adhémar de Monteil en 1250. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1273, à Saint-Paul-Trois-Châteaux, Drôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Aymar d'Adhémar de Monteil 1205 in Aymard, Hérault, Languedoc-Roussillon, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Géraud II Adhémar de Monteil 40 und seine Mutter Mabille de Marseille 31. Er hat 1250 Clémence Adhémar de Monteil geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1273 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Saint-Paul-Trois-Châteaux, Drôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Aymar d'Adhémar de Monteil è nato il nel 1205 nel Aymard, Hérault, Languedoc-Roussillon, Francia, il suo padre, Géraud II Adhémar de Monteil, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Mabille de Marseille, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Clémence Adhémar de Monteil nel 1250. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1273, nel Saint-Paul-Trois-Châteaux, Drôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, all'età di 68 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Aymar d'Adhémar de Monteilが1205年にフランスラングエドク-ロウシロンheラウルトエイマルドで生まれた時，父Géraud II Adhémar de Monteilは40歳，母Mabille de Marseilleは31歳であった。1250年にClémence Adhémar de Monteilと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1273年にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスドルoメサイント-プアウル-トロイス-チaテアウックスで68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Aymar d'Adhémar de Monteil(이)가 1205년 프랑스 랭도c-루시런 he라트 아이마드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Géraud II Adhémar de Monteil(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Mabille de Marseille(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1250년 Clémence Adhémar de Monteil(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1273년 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 드o 세인트-폴-트로이스-cha테오스에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Aymar d'Adhémar de Monteil nasceu em 1205, em Aymard, Hérault, Languedoc-Roussillon, França, seu pai, Géraud II Adhémar de Monteil, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Mabille de Marseille, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Clémence Adhémar de Monteil em 1250. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1273, em Saint-Paul-Trois-Châteaux, Drôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França, com 68 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Aymar d'Adhémar de Monteil родился в 1205 г. в местности аимард, хeраулт, лангуедок-руссиллон, Франция, его отцу по имени Géraud II Adhémar de Monteil было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Mabille de Marseille, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Clémence Adhémar de Monteil в 1250 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1273 г. в местности сеинт-поул-троис-чaтокс, дрoм, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция в возрасте 68 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Aymar d'Adhémar de Monteil nació en 1205, en Aymard, Hérault, Languedoc-Roussillon, Francia, su papá, Géraud II Adhémar de Monteil, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Mabille de Marseille, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Clémence Adhémar de Monteil en 1250. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en 1273, en Saint-Paul-Trois-Châteaux, Drôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, a la edad de 68 años.
